title: Combat Companion
description: A persistent tactical HUD for D&D 5e – action economy, multi-attack tracker, reactions list, ally-applied effects, combat-only features, ability scores, skills, conditions, spells with slots, weapon attacks, saving throws, features & abilities, and more. v1.7.0: Combat-only tracker panel with multi-attack dots, per-reaction-item spent state, ally-origin active effects (auras, bless, etc.) and self-combat features (Rage, Sneak Attack, Cunning Action). All state resets at the start of the actor's turn.
